creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a problem with all linux ports

For instance:

http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101i386-default-PR209382/2016-05-08_19h55m31s/logs/errors/linux-f10-png-1.2.37_2.log


[101i386-default-PR209382-job-21] Installing linux_base-f10-10_9...
[101i386-default-PR209382-job-21] Extracting linux_base-f10-10_9: ........ done
pkg-static: Fail to set time on /compat/linux/proc: Operation not supported

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): /packages/All/linux_base-f10-10_9.txz
*** Error code 70
